name: dl-studio-mac
description: Desktop batch video downsampler for macOS.
author: DL Studio

scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg pkg
scripts.dist:arm64: npm run build && cross-env DL_STUDIO_MAC_ARCH=arm64 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg pkg --arm64
scripts.dist:x64: npm run build && cross-env DL_STUDIO_MAC_ARCH=x64 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg pkg --x64
